headline: Textron Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Textron (NYSE:TXT) executives highlighted a strong start to 2026 and outlined a major strategic shift during the company’s first-quarter earnings call: an intended separation of its Industrial segment from its aerospace and defense (A&D) businesses. headline: TXT Q1 Deep Dive: Industrial Separation and Aerospace-Defense Focus Take Center Stage
summary: Aerospace and defense company Textron (NYSE:TXT) announced better-than-expected revenue in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 11.8% year on year to $3.70 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.45 per share was 11.2% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
